 {"id":"bd-be7a","title":"Create npm package structure with package.json","description":"Set up initial npm package structure for @beads/bd:

## Files to create
- npm/package.json - Package metadata, dependencies, scripts
- npm/bin/bd - CLI wrapper script that invokes native binary
- npm/.gitignore - Ignore downloaded binaries
- npm/README.md - Installation and usage instructions

## package.json structure
- Name: @beads/bd (scoped package)
- Main: index.js (exports binary path)
- Bin: bin/bd (CLI entry point)
- Scripts: postinstall (download binary)
- Keywords: issue-tracker, cli, beads, bd
- License: MIT

## Bin wrapper
Simple Node.js script that:
- Spawns native binary with child_process.spawn
- Passes through all arguments and stdio
- Exits with binary's exit code","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-02T23:39:47.416779-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-03T10:31:45.381258-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-03T10:31:45.381258-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-be7a","depends_on_id":"bd-febc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-11-02T23:40:32.923859-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"bd-ov1","title":"Doctor: exclude merge artifacts from 'multiple JSONL' warning","description":"## Problem
`bd doctor` warns about 'Multiple JSONL files found' when merge artifact files exist:
```
JSONL Files: Multiple JSONL files found: beads.base.jsonl, beads.left.jsonl, issues.jsonl ⚠
```

This is confusing because these aren't real issue JSONL files - they're temporary snapshots for deletion tracking.

## Fix
Exclude known merge artifact patterns from the multiple-JSONL warning:

```go
// In doctor JSONL check
skipPatterns := map[string]bool{
    "beads.base.jsonl": true,
    "beads.left.jsonl": true, 
    "beads.right.jsonl": true,
}
```

## Files
- cmd/bd/doctor/ (JSONL check logic)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-11-28T17:06:26.266097-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-02T17:11:19.747094858-05:00","closed_at":"2025-11-28T21:52:13.632029-08:00"}

-{"id":"bd-ovypp","title":"Review & merge PR #1023: MCP custom issue types fix","description":"dispatched_by: beads/crew/emma

## PR Review Task

**PR:** https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/1023
**Author:** marvin-bitterlich

## Summary
Fix Pydantic validation errors when MCP lists issues with custom types (agent, molecule, event, convoy).

## Changes
- Change IssueType and IssueStatus from Literal to str in models.py
- Update parameter descriptions in server.py and tools.py
- Bump version in uv.lock from 0.34.0 to 0.47.0

## Review Checklist
1. Pull branch locally: `gh pr checkout 1023 --repo steveyegge/beads`
2. Run tests: `go test ./... && cd integrations/beads-mcp && uv run pytest`
3. Verify MCP works with custom types
4. If all good, merge: `gh pr merge 1023 --repo steveyegge/beads --squash`

## Classification
Easy-win: Clear bug fix, minimal changes, well-documented reasoning.","status":"hooked","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"beads/crew/dave","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-11T18:17:30.36625-08:00","created_by":"beads/crew/emma","updated_at":"2026-01-11T18:17:43.678078-08:00"}

 {"id":"bd-oxgi","title":"Add mol_type schema field to beads","description":"Add mol_type field to distinguish molecule types (swarm/patrol/work).

## Context
Swarms need to be distinguishable from regular work molecules. The mol_type field enables:
- Filtering: bd list --type=swarm 
- Queries: Find all active swarm molecules
- Coordinator logic: Different handling for different mol types

## Implementation
1. Add mol_type column to SQLite schema (nullable, default null = work)
2. Add mol_type to JSONL format
3. Update create command to accept --mol-type
4. Update list/ready commands to filter by mol_type
5. Values: 'swarm', 'patrol', 'work', null (null = work)

## Reference
~/gt/docs/swarm-architecture.md - 'Data Model' section

## Acceptance
- bd create --mol-type=swarm works
- bd list --mol-type=swarm filters correctly
- Existing molecules work unchanged (backward compatible)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-28T19:11:07.616818-08:00","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2025-12-28T19:50:33.213538-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-28T19:50:33.213538-08:00"}
